title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何创作一幅融合现代城市街头文化和日本视觉文化的高端涂鸦风格肖像海报，适用于需要展示时尚、前卫品牌形象的中文营销场景，如时尚品牌宣传、潮流活动推广等。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何创作一幅融合现代城市街头文化和日本视觉文化的高端涂鸦风格肖像海报，适用于需要展示时尚、前卫品牌形象的中文营销场景，如时尚品牌宣传、潮流活动推广等。
prompt_original: Create a high-detail portrait poster in a bold Japanese graffiti-inspired art style, combining modern urban street aesthetics with expressive Japanese visual culture. The poster should feature dynamic graffiti typography, layered spray-paint textures, hand-drawn symbols, abstract paint splashes, neon brush strokes, urban sticker elements, Japanese calligraphy accents, and decorative ornaments that strongly reinforce the energetic atmosphere of the design. The overall composition should feel artistic, rebellious, fashionable, and visually striking, while still maintaining a premium editorial poster quality instead of looking messy or overdone. Humanity somehow turned vandalism into luxury wall art. Impressive species. The subject must not replicate the exact pose or expression from the reference photo. Instead, create a completely new pose that feels natural, confident, and full of life. The expression should appear emotionally expressive, charismatic, and engaging, avoiding stiff, awkward, flat, or emotionless body language. The pose should reflect the elegance and sophistication commonly seen in international fashion models, with stylish posture, natural movement, and subtle attitude that enhances the overall cinematic fashion aesthetic. The outfit should feature contemporary stylish casual fashion with strong visual appeal. Avoid plain or repetitive clothing designs. Use fashionable layering, modern streetwear inspiration, premium casual styling, and a balanced combination of colors, patterns, textures, and fabric types that create a rich and non-monotonous appearance. The clothing should feel trendy, fashionable, youthful, and visually premium while still fitting naturally into the Japanese graffiti poster concept. The background and poster decorations should be filled with thematic urban Japanese-inspired visual elements such as graffiti walls, spray textures, painted symbols, urban signage, layered stickers, modern Japanese graphic motifs, abstract shapes, paint drips, street fashion aesthetics, and stylish decorative compositions that enhance depth and artistic intensity without distracting from the subject. Lighting should feel cinematic and fashionable, with strong contrast, clean highlights, realistic skin texture, and high-end editorial poster quality. The final result must look like a premium modern street-fashion campaign poster with highly detailed textures, balanced composition, vibrant color harmony, realistic proportions, ultra-sharp focus, and immersive visual storytelling. Ultra-detailed, highly aesthetic, premium composition, realistic texture rendering, fashionable urban atmosphere, cinematic quality, poster-ready design, 8K ultra high resolution.
prompt_zh: 创建一幅高细节的肖像海报，采用大胆的日式涂鸦艺术风格，结合现代城市街头美学和表现力十足的日本视觉文化。海报应包含动态涂鸦字体、层层叠叠的喷漆纹理、手绘符号、抽象的油漆飞溅、霓虹笔触、城市贴纸元素、日式书法点缀以及装饰性图案，这些元素应强烈增强设计的活力氛围。整体构图应显得艺术、叛逆、时尚且视觉冲击力强，同时保持高端编辑海报的质量，避免显得杂乱或过度堆砌。人类将破坏行为转变成奢华墙面艺术，真是令人印象深刻。主体人物不应复制参考照片中的姿势或表情，而是创造一个全新的、自然、自信且充满活力的姿势。表情应显得情感丰富、有魅力且吸引人，避免僵硬、尴尬、平淡或无表情的身体语言。姿势应反映出国际时尚模特常见的优雅与精致，具有时尚的姿势、自然的动作和微妙的态度，以增强整体的电影时尚美感。服装应为当代时尚休闲风格，具有强烈的视觉吸引力。避免使用简单或重复的服装设计。使用时尚的层次搭配、现代街头服饰灵感、高端休闲风格以及颜色、图案、纹理和面料类型的平衡组合，创造出丰富而不单调的外观。服装应显得时髦、时尚、年轻且视觉上高档，同时自然融入日式涂鸦海报的概念。背景和海报装饰应充满主题性的城市日式视觉元素，如涂鸦墙、喷漆纹理、绘制符号、城市标志、层层贴纸、现代日本图形图案、抽象形状、油漆滴落、街头时尚美学以及增强深度和艺术强度的时尚装饰组合，但不分散对主体的注意力。灯光应显得电影化和时尚，具有强烈的对比度、干净的高光、真实的皮肤质感和高端编辑海报的质量。最终结果应看起来像是一幅高端现代街头时尚广告海报，具有高度细致的纹理、平衡的构图、鲜艳的色彩和谐、逼真的比例、超清晰的焦点和沉浸式的视觉叙事。超高细节、高度美观、高端构图、逼真的纹理渲染、时尚的城市氛围、电影质量、适合海报的设计、8K 超高清分辨率。
